lockedNextSource.selectionReason: Starts the integer factor-multiple-GCD-LCM prerequisite ladder with a deterministic unique-answer domain before decimal and fraction pipelines.

pairedFollowUpSource.processingRule: Review after g5a_u02_5a02a but preserve a distinct sourceId and source-evidence boundary.

publicCatalogDecision.rationale: Batch A and Batch B are internal implementation and release waves, not learner-facing curriculum dimensions. A public batch toggle would expose internal architecture and create unnecessary catalog, query-state and deep-link complexity.

publicCatalogDecision.compatibilityRule: Existing batch-a-* DOM ids, query keys and module names may remain internal until a separately scoped compatibility migration is approved.
publicCatalogDecision.currentMismatch: G4B-U04 is a Batch B production source but the public Classic page still labels the whole catalog as Batch A.

goalDistance.distanceReduced: Removed the next-source decision blocker and the public Batch A/Batch B presentation ambiguity without expanding curriculum or runtime scope.
remainingBlockers: Public catalog still displays Batch A labels around a mixed Batch A/Batch B source catalog
